studyName: NHLBI TOPMed: MESA and MESA Family AA-CAC

tables.description: This sample attributes table includes samples with methylation data, body site where sample was collected, analyte type, histological type, tumor status, subject status, age at collection, primary biosample ID and type, Uberon ID and term, collection year and visit, analyte information (n=4 variables; ID, isolation type, year, and lab), sample container and well, assay type, assay lab, funding source, TOPMed phase, project, and study name, sample use, Illumina chip barcode and assay position, number of SNPs, decode and extract dates.

variables.name: AGE_AT_COLLECTION
variables.description: Subject age at time of primary biosample collection

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATED
variables.description: Type of analyte isolated from primary biosample or derived material

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATION_LAB
variables.description: Name of laboratory performing the analyte isolation

variables.name: ANALYTE_ISOLATION_YEAR
variables.description: Year in which analyte was isolated

variables.name: ANALYTE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Identifier for an analyte sample extracted from primary biosample or isolated material

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of analyte to be measured from the submitted sample

variables.name: ASSAY_LAB
variables.description: Name of assay lab to which the samples were sent

variables.name: ASSAY_TYPE
variables.description: Assay Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken

variables.name: Barcode
variables.description: Illumina chip Sentrix barcode

variables.name: COLLECTION_VISIT
variables.description: Study visit identifier for when the primary biosample was collected

variables.name: COLLECTION_YEAR
variables.description: Year in which primary biosample was collected

variables.name: FUNDING_SOURCE
variables.description: Project funding source

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Primary biosample type

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status of the sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_BIOSAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Methylomics TOEID Identifier for primary biosample

variables.name: PRIMARY_BIOSAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of primary biosample

variables.name: RowCol
variables.description: Illumina chip assay position

variables.name: SAMPLE_CONTAINER_ID
variables.description: Identifier for sample plate, box or other container used for shipping samples to assay center

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: TOEID identifier of sample

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use

variables.name: SAMPLE_WELL_ID
variables.description: Identifier for well, cell, or other subdivision of the sample shipment container

variables.name: STUDY_NAME
variables.description: TOPMed-assigned short study name (1:1 with TOPMed phs number)

variables.name: SUBJECT_STATUS
variables.description: Status of subject at time of tissue collection

variables.name: TOPMED_PHASE
variables.description: TOPMed phase

variables.name: TOPMED_PROJECT
variables.description: TOPMed project that funded sequencing

variables.name: UBERON_ID
variables.description: UBERON ontology identifier for Type of primary biosample

variables.name: UBERON_TERM
variables.description: UBERON ontology term for type of primary biosample

variables.name: decodeDate
variables.description: Earliest date shown for 'AutoDecode' action in the .idat 'RunInfo' table.  Presumably related to the chip manufacturing date.

variables.name: extractDate
variables.description: Earliest date shown for 'Scan', 'Register' and 'Extract' actions in the .idat 'RunInfo' table.  Presumably date when the chip was scanned after hybridization, extension and staining.

variables.name: nSNPsRead
variables.description: Value reported as 'nSNPsRead' in Illumina .idat file header

variables.description: Type of analyte to be measured from the submitted sample

variables.description: Assay lab to which the samples were sent

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Anatomical site at which biosample was taken

tables.description: The subject consent data table contains subject IDs, consent group information, subject's sex, and subject aliases.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Participant Sex

variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

tables.description: This subject sample mapping data table includes a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: MESA SHARE Participant ID
